tips_en: Start with the Flow-OPD paper, which offers a broadly applicable solution to multi-task alignment in generative vision and achieves striking improvements by unifying flow matching with on-policy distillation and GRPO. It is methodologically linked to the skill-augmented LLM agent work through their shared use of GRPO to solve credit-assignment challenges, while the dance generation paper extends cascaded mixture-of-experts ideas to high-fidelity motion synthesis.
tips_zh: 建议优先阅读 Flow-OPD 论文，它为生成式视觉中的多任务对齐提供了通用解决方案，通过统一流匹配、在线策略蒸馏与 GRPO 实现了显著提升。该方法与技能增强型 LLM 智能体论文在利用 GRPO 解决信用分配问题上存在方法论关联，而舞蹈生成论文则将级联混合专家框架拓展到了高保真动作合成领域。
